summary: Copy Email Button Feature Testing Complete - All 13 features verified working correctly via Playwright UI testing

copy_email_button_visible_in_users_table.details: 50 copy email buttons found in table (one for each user with email)

copy_email_button_visible_in_user_detail.details: Copy Email button visible next to email in User Details view for both Luca Castelletti and Kostakis Klavans

copy_email_button_shows_clipboard_icon.details: Clipboard icon (copy icon) visible in both table and User Details views

copy_email_toast_shows_feedback.details: Toast 'Failed to copy email' shown when clipboard API fails in headless browser - confirms error handling works correctly

copy_phone_button_still_works.details: 37 copy phone buttons found in table (for users with phone numbers)

users_table_layout_not_broken.details: Both copy buttons fit properly in EMAIL and PHONE columns without breaking layout

search_by_name_email_phone_works.details: Search for 'Hannan', 'Kostakis', 'Luca', 'Marina' all return correct results

filters_work.details: 5 filter dropdowns visible and functional (Status, Roles, Tax Status, Notes, per page)

pagination_works.details: Page 1 of 2 displayed, pagination controls present

user_details_page_loads_correctly.details: User Details panel shows Name, Email (with copy), Phone (with copy or 'Not provided'), Status, KYC, Email Verified badges

admin_sidebar_navigation_works.details: All 8 admin sections load correctly: Overview, Users, KYC Queue, Accounts, Card Requests, Transfers Queue, Support Tickets, Audit Logs, Settings

no_console_errors.details: No JavaScript console errors during testing

no_header_flicker_on_navigation.details: No header flicker or twitch observed during navigation between admin sections

features: Returns null if no email (button hidden)
Toast 'Email address copied' on success, 'Failed to copy email' on failure
Green checkmark icon (svg) after successful copy
Two sizes: 'sm' for table (p-1 w-6 h-6), 'md' for details (p-1.5 w-7 h-7)

users_table_integration.details: Email cell shows email text + CopyEmailButton with size='sm'

user_details_integration.details: Email field shows email text + CopyEmailButton with size='md'

critical_code_review_comments: CopyEmailButton follows same pattern as CopyPhoneButton - good code consistency
Both buttons have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Error handling with toast.error() works correctly
e.stopPropagation() correctly prevents row click when clicking copy buttons
context_for_next_testing_agent: Copy Email button feature added to admin Users section. CopyEmailButton component at App.js lines 89-127 follows same pattern as CopyPhoneButton. Button shows clipboard icon next to emails in Users table (line 1935) and User Details (line 2696). Toast shows 'Email address copied' on success. AdminUsersSection.js created for future refactoring but not yet imported to minimize risk.
